sections.heading: Seatime Calculator — Accurate Sea Time Calculation for Seafarers
sections.content: Instantly calculate your total sea service in days and months with this free seatime calculator. Perfect for DG Shipping (India), MCA (UK), USCG (USA), and STCW applications.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Seatime Calculator — Accurate Sea Time Calculation for Seafarers do?
faq.answer: Instantly calculate your total sea service in days and months with this free seatime calculator. Perfect for DG Shipping (India), MCA (UK), USCG (USA), and STCW applications.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
